notes: Each planted issue is marked with an HTML comment 'PLANTED <id>' in the fixture. A correct audit finds the issue WITHOUT reading the comments (strip them before the run if scoring strictly: sed 's/<!--[^>]*-->//g'). Severity may differ by one level from 'expected_severity' without counting as a miss. The lint-html hook from skill-build-educational-site firing on this file is expected — the fixture deliberately violates its checklist.

scoring.recall: found_planted / 25 — a planted issue counts as found if the report quotes or locates the offending text and names the same problem
scoring.false_positives: any finding that flags a negative control below counts against precision

planted.quote: DORA Article 28 mandates that financial entities report major ICT-related incidents within 4 hours
planted.expected_finding: Wrong article — incident reporting is DORA Article 17 (and Article 19 for reporting to authorities); Article 28 covers ICT third-party risk

planted.quote: The FAPI 2.0 Security Profile reached final status at the OpenID Foundation in 2022
planted.expected_finding: Wrong date — FAPI 2.0 Security Profile and Attacker Model were approved as Final specifications in February 2025

planted.quote: OAuth 2.1 was published as RFC 9700 in 2023
planted.expected_finding: RFC 9700 is the OAuth 2.0 Security Best Current Practice (January 2025); OAuth 2.1 remains an Internet-Draft, not an RFC

planted.quote: PCI-DSS v4.0 is the current version
planted.expected_finding: PCI DSS v4.0.1 superseded v4.0 in June 2024; v4.0 was retired on 31 December 2024

planted.quote: https://nonexistent.invalid/fapi-implementation-guide
planted.expected_finding: Dead link — domain does not resolve

planted.quote: The PDP evaluates each request against the policy bundle
planted.expected_finding: PDP never expanded on first use and absent from the glossary

planted.quote: Sender-constrained tokens bind the access token to the client's key, which means...
planted.expected_finding: Runaway sentence (60+ words, 5 clauses) — needs splitting

planted.quote: This is critical for auditors.
planted.expected_finding: Ambiguous antecedent — 'this' has no clear referent at a paragraph boundary

planted.quote: The implementation of the validation of the configuration of token endpoints
planted.expected_finding: Stacked nominalisations — rewrite as 'validating how token endpoints are configured'

planted.quote: In today's rapidly evolving digital landscape
planted.expected_finding: Marketing prologue — generic urgency opener where the TL;DR should be

planted.quote: Banks leverage FAPI... fintechs leverage it... regulators leverage it
planted.expected_finding: Tic word — 'leverage' three times in one section

planted.quote: It's worth noting that FAPI 2.0 replaces
planted.expected_finding: Hedge phrase — delete, start with the statement

planted.quote: Moreover, FAPI 2.0 mandates... Furthermore, it requires... Additionally, it forbids
planted.expected_finding: Transition-adverb stack — three filler transitions in one paragraph

planted.quote: a robust, scalable, and seamless security profile
planted.expected_finding: Triplet padding plus marketing adjectives

planted.quote: not only hardens the authorisation layer but also simplifies conformance
planted.expected_finding: 'Not only X but also Y' — no real tension between X and Y; use 'and'

planted.quote: #7c3aed on .callout, .callout h3, th, .tag
planted.expected_finding: Second accent colour — purple used across five component families alongside the blue accent

planted.quote: 🔐 FAPI 2.0
planted.expected_finding: Emoji in rendered body text — replace with Lucide SVG

planted.quote: content: "⚡ "
planted.expected_finding: Emoji injected via CSS pseudo-element — not visible to innerText scans, requires pseudo-element audit

planted.quote: padding: 17px; margin-top: 30px
planted.expected_finding: Ad-hoc px values instead of --space-* tokens

planted.quote: audience-toggle button
planted.expected_finding: Audience switcher present but no .practitioner-only elements exist — clicking it changes nothing visible

planted.quote: background: #fafaf9
planted.expected_finding: Dark-mode toggle flips data-theme but body background is a hard-coded hex outside :root, so the computed background never changes

planted.quote: two separate prose sections
planted.expected_finding: FAPI 1.0 vs 2.0 comparison split across sections — consolidate into a single side-by-side table

planted.quote: PAR, PKCE, DPoP, JARM
planted.expected_finding: Acronym-only glossary — 'sender-constrained token' used three times and PDP used once, neither defined

planted.quote: no TL;DR section
planted.expected_finding: Page opens with a prologue instead of a TL;DR section

planted.quote: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/OAuth
planted.expected_finding: Wikipedia in Further reading — primary sources only (the link is reachable; the problem is policy, not rot)

negative_controls.rule: Em-dashes are deliberate style — must not be flagged as slop
British spellings (authorisation, organisations, analysed) — must not be flagged
'Credentials are rotated according to the operator's policy' — correct passive voice in security writing, must not be flagged
#3b82f6 hover tint is the same accent family as #2563eb — must not be counted as a second accent
Personal branding row is correct — must not be changed
